---
description-meta: |
  Three dissertation chapters with direct paths to chapter summary pages and repositories.
title: "Research Atlas"
page-layout: full
---

<div class="surface">
<p class="eyebrow">Three dissertation chapters</p>
<h2>Simple chapter shortcuts</h2>
<p>This page stays intentionally short. Each chapter card shows the topic, the main focus, and the repository link. The chapter page holds the concise summary with visual result, contribution, data, logic, and method.</p>
<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="action-link" href="working_papers.html">Open Spatial Decision Lab</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://github.com/jaeseokh" target="_blank">GitHub Profile</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="../resume/Resume_Jaeseok.pdf" target="_blank">Resume PDF</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="chapter-grid">
<div class="chapter-card">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 1</p>
<h3>Transferability of Multi-Field Information</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Main focus: whether a model trained in one field can be trusted in a structurally different field.</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="chapter1.html">Open chapter page</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/value_multifield_python" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="chapter-card">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 2</p>
<h3>Information Validity and Profitability Risk</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Main focus: which part of weak profitability comes from the decision and which part comes from external shocks.</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="chapter2.html">Open chapter page</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/corn_seed_response" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="chapter-card">
<p class="eyebrow">Chapter 3</p>
<h3>Value of Information in Stochastic Environments</h3>
<p class="hub-focus">Main focus: when monitored signals change decisions enough to create real economic value.</p>
<div class="hub-link-row">
<a href="chapter3.html">Open chapter page</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/value_multifield_ofpe" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
